en: Oh that you would rend the heavens and come down, that the mountains might quake at your presence-
zh: 願你裂天而降！ 願群山都在你面前震動！

en: as when fire kindles brushwood and the fire causes water to boil- to make your name known to your adversaries, and that the nations might tremble at your presence!
zh: 好像火燒著乾柴，又像火把水燒開， 使你的敵人認識你的名， 使列國在你面前發顫。

en: When you did awesome things that we did not look for, you came down, the mountains quaked at your presence.
zh: 你行了可畏的事，是我們料想不到的， 那時你降臨，群山都在你面前震動。

en: From of old no one has heard or perceived by the ear, no eye has seen a God besides you, who acts for those who wait for him.
zh: 從古時以來，人未曾聽過， 耳未曾聞過，眼未曾見過， 在你以外還有甚麼神， 能為等候他的人行事的。

en: You meet him who joyfully works righteousness, those who remember you in your ways. Behold, you were angry, and we sinned; in our sins we have been a long time, and shall we be saved?
zh: 你善待那些喜歡行義， 在你的道路上記念你的人。 看哪！你曾發怒，因為我們犯了罪； 這樣的情形已經很久， 我們還能得救嗎？

en: We have all become like one who is unclean, and all our righteous deeds are like a polluted garment. We all fade like a leaf, and our iniquities, like the wind, take us away.
zh: 我們眾人都像不潔淨的人， 我們所有的義，都像污穢的衣服； 我們眾人都像葉子枯乾， 我們的罪孽好像風一般把我們吹去。

en: There is no one who calls upon your name, who rouses himself to take hold of you; for you have hidden your face from us, and have made us melt in the hand of our iniquities.
zh: 沒有人呼求你的名， 沒有人奮起抓著你； 因為你掩面不顧我們， 使我們在自己罪孽的權勢下融化。

en: But now, O LORD, you are our Father; we are the clay, and you are our potter; we are all the work of your hand.
zh: 耶和華啊！現在你還是我們的父； 我們不過是泥土，你才是陶匠； 我們眾人都是你手所作的。

en: Be not so terribly angry, O LORD, and remember not iniquity forever. Behold, please look, we are all your people.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你不要大發烈怒。 不要永遠記念罪孽。 求你垂看我們，我們眾人都是你的子民。

en: Your holy cities have become a wilderness; Zion has become a wilderness, Jerusalem a desolation.
zh: 你的聖城變了曠野， 錫安成了曠野， 耶路撒冷成了荒場。

en: Our holy and beautiful house, where our fathers praised you, has been burned by fire, and all our pleasant places have become ruins.
zh: 我們那聖潔和榮美的殿， 就是我們的列祖讚美你的所在， 被火燒了。 我們所喜愛的一切，都成了廢墟。

en: Will you restrain yourself at these things, O LORD? Will you keep silent, and afflict us so terribly?
zh: 耶和華啊！對這些事你還忍得住嗎？ 你仍然緘默不言，使我們受苦到極點嗎？
